title: The Swan King | Explanation in Hindi | Class 6
description:
When a proud, powerful king discovers that a golden swan can speak — and that it has something devastating to say about his own character — the real story of *The Swan King* begins. This Class 6 English lesson hides a sharp lesson about ego, humility, and the consequences of arrogance beneath what looks like a simple animal tale. If you've been searching for *The Swan King* explanation in Hindi that actually makes the moral land, not just translate words, you're in the right place.
